infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Genkochi needs camera access to take photos for language learning
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Genkochi needs photo library access to select photos for language learning
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Genkochi needs microphone access for speech practice
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Genkochi uses speech recognition to help you practice pronunciation
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Genkochi uses your location to place photos on your vocabulary map

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Genkochi to access your camera for language learning

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Genkochi to access your photos for language learning

plugins.microphonePermission: Genkochi needs microphone access for speech practice
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Genkochi uses speech recognition to help you practice pronunciation

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Genkochi uses your location to place photos on your vocabulary map
